calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Mel Patterson appearing via zoom for Pacific Guardianship Services and Ingrid Thurau.

Mr. Patterson stated that the trust package was destroyed in a fire some years ago. The Court made note of the order filed on December 27, 2004 that referred to Indrid Thurau as trustee. Mr. Patterson stated that this is the only document they had, and that a thorough search was done, but they found no evidence of a trust anywhere. Mr. Patterson also stated that the issue of Ingrid being the sole beneficiary is based on what the client has informed them of, that Ingrid is under a guardianship in Washington, that he does not believe she is able to perform as trustee and that he is in touch with the controller's office. In addition, Mr. Patterson stated that the Controller's office is aware of the situation and that if the Court issues an order disbursing the funds to Ingrid, they will. The Petition for instructions is under submission with the intent to grant except for the request for fees and costs which is to be addressed by the Washington Court.

Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.
